scope_note: This evidence index is generated from a curated public artifact catalog and verifies that required reports, payloads, and CI files exist in the repository. It is a recruiter-facing map of evidence, not a Waymo benchmark claim.

stages.label: Product surface
stages.summary: Makes the repo understandable quickly through static public artifacts.

stages.label: Data boundary
stages.summary: Documents what data is trusted, derived, local, and excluded from git.

stages.label: Scenario mining
stages.summary: Shows ScenarioLens can rank and explain real motion scenarios.

stages.label: Baseline models
stages.summary: Compares lightweight prediction baselines with honest wins and regressions.

stages.label: Replay bridge
stages.summary: Connects mined cases to laptop-safe open-loop replay diagnostics.

stages.label: Lane continuation
stages.summary: Audits map-link and lane-continuation failure modes at larger scale.

stages.label: Selector validation
stages.summary: Validates conservative selector gates before changing default behavior.

stages.label: Release readiness
stages.summary: Keeps the public repo tested and contribution-ready.

artifacts.title: Static Scenario Explorer
artifacts.scope: 14 public demo scenarios plus real-data evidence links
artifacts.data_status: public fixtures plus aggregate/derived real-data links
artifacts.why_it_matters: Gives a reviewer a zero-install first look at ranking, filtering, trajectory previews, failure cards, and selector diagnostics.
artifacts.limitation: The explorer is static and does not expose raw Waymo data.

artifacts.title: Explorer Run Contract
artifacts.scope: Aggregate metadata from the reproducible 1,193-scenario run
artifacts.data_status: aggregate run metrics and portable report links only
artifacts.why_it_matters: Connects the visible Explorer to the same provenance, stage metrics, digest, and resource evidence emitted by the CLI.
artifacts.limitation: The public payload joins aggregate real-run evidence to separately checked-in fixture trajectories; it does not publish raw records.

artifacts.title: Data Provenance Boundary
artifacts.scope: Public-safe data handling and raw-data exclusion policy
artifacts.data_status: raw Waymo files ignored; public artifacts are derived
artifacts.why_it_matters: Makes the project credible without implying private-data access or publishing restricted raw records.
artifacts.limitation: External users need their own Waymo Open Dataset access.

artifacts.title: Cross-Shard Failure Stability
artifacts.scope: 100 scenarios across 4 local Waymo Motion validation shards
artifacts.data_status: aggregate public report from local validation shards
artifacts.why_it_matters: Shows that the ranking and baseline-failure workflow runs beyond one toy fixture or hand-picked scene.
artifacts.limitation: This is a local diagnostic slice, not a Waymo benchmark.

artifacts.title: Context-Joined Failure Study
artifacts.scope: Map, route, signal, and failure metrics over the 100-scenario slice
artifacts.data_status: public scenario IDs and aggregate context counts
artifacts.why_it_matters: Connects scenario mining to map/signal context so failures are actionable, not just high numeric scores.
artifacts.limitation: Context fields are derived from the lightweight parser boundary.

artifacts.title: Lane-Aware Baseline Diagnostic
artifacts.scope: Constant-velocity vs lane-aware estimates on 100 real scenarios
artifacts.data_status: aggregate public report with wins and regressions
artifacts.why_it_matters: Demonstrates honest model evaluation: the map-aware baseline helps some cases and regresses others.
artifacts.limitation: The lane-aware baseline is diagnostic, not a production predictor.

artifacts.title: Heading-Aware Lane Selection Study
artifacts.scope: 418 evaluated prediction targets from the 100-scenario slice
artifacts.data_status: aggregate target-level comparison
artifacts.why_it_matters: Turns a failed naive map baseline into a specific matcher ablation with measured improvement over nearest-lane selection.
artifacts.limitation: Heading-aware selection still trails constant velocity overall.

artifacts.title: Heading-Aware Replay Prototype
artifacts.scope: Selected heading-aware cases with deterministic perturbations
artifacts.data_status: public-safe replay summary; local packets ignored
artifacts.why_it_matters: Shows the path from mined cases to replay-style validation while staying laptop-safe.
artifacts.limitation: Open-loop diagnostic only; no closed-loop Waymax/JAX claim.

artifacts.title: 200-Scenario Lane-Continuation Study
artifacts.scope: 451 lane-continuation targets across four local validation shards
artifacts.data_status: aggregate public report from local shards
artifacts.why_it_matters: Scales the lane-continuation diagnosis from isolated examples to a larger real-data target set.
artifacts.limitation: Still bounded to four local validation shards.

artifacts.title: 200-Scenario Continuation Replay
artifacts.scope: Replay/probe queue derived from the 200-scenario continuation study
artifacts.data_status: public-safe replay summary; local trajectories ignored
artifacts.why_it_matters: Checks whether continuation candidates survive bounded replay and topology probes.
artifacts.limitation: Open-loop rollouts only, with local per-case artifacts ignored.

artifacts.title: 200-Scenario Terminal Selector Calibration
artifacts.scope: Zero-false-promotion gate sweep over terminal-neighborhood cases
artifacts.data_status: derived candidate labels and aggregate counts
artifacts.why_it_matters: Makes selector promotion conservative and measurable instead of silently changing behavior.
artifacts.limitation: The selected gate is provisional and queue-bounded.

artifacts.title: Terminal Selector Transfer Validation
artifacts.scope: 7-case validation queue, including 4 novel transfer cases
artifacts.data_status: derived replay labels and selector outcomes
artifacts.why_it_matters: Tests whether the selector gate transfers beyond the calibration queue without false promotions.
artifacts.limitation: The transfer queue is intentionally small and diagnostic.

artifacts.title: Context-Aware Selector Candidate Validation
artifacts.scope: Candidate policy joined to transfer and route/context audits
artifacts.data_status: public-safe candidate labels and rationale
artifacts.why_it_matters: Shows one narrow improvement path: recover a false hold while preserving negative controls.
artifacts.limitation: The default selector remains unchanged pending broader validation.

artifacts.title: 993-Scenario Frozen Selector Holdout
artifacts.scope: 78 perturbation-replayed selector decisions from 993 withheld scenarios across four local validation shards
artifacts.data_status: aggregate metrics, policy outcomes, hashes, and release gates
artifacts.why_it_matters: Tests a promising small-cohort selector without retuning and rejects adoption when the larger holdout reveals false promotions.
artifacts.limitation: This is same-shard scenario-window validation, not an independent-shard benchmark; the candidate creates 12 false promotions and remains disabled.

artifacts.title: Terminal Selector Decision Atlas
artifacts.scope: 7 derived selector cards joined to candidate-validation labels
artifacts.data_status: SVG decision cards plus public-safe JSON payload
artifacts.why_it_matters: Turns the selector validation into visual evidence a reviewer can inspect quickly.
artifacts.limitation: No raw Waymo trajectories or map geometry are published.

artifacts.title: Selector Atlas Demo Payload
artifacts.scope: Public-safe selector decision cards loaded by the static Explorer
artifacts.data_status: derived public JSON, no raw trajectories
artifacts.why_it_matters: Keeps the Explorer a thin presentation layer over generated, tested artifacts.
artifacts.limitation: The payload mirrors selected public report fields only.

artifacts.title: Full-Corpus Run Reproducibility
artifacts.scope: Two complete analysis runs over 1,193 scenarios from four local validation shards
artifacts.data_status: aggregate digest, timing, memory, and readiness checks only
artifacts.why_it_matters: Proves the one-command product path completes deterministically on the full local corpus within the declared laptop budgets.
artifacts.limitation: The local corpus is not a Waymo benchmark and raw records remain outside git.

artifacts.title: V1 Clean-Package Release Check
artifacts.scope: Reproducible wheel build, isolated install, installed product, failure diagnostics, and interruption/resume probes
artifacts.data_status: CI-safe synthetic fixtures and package metadata only
artifacts.why_it_matters: Proves that the shipped artifact works outside the source checkout and that its critical recovery and failure contracts are executable.
artifacts.limitation: The installed probes use public synthetic fixtures and complement, rather than replace, the separate real-data reports.

artifacts.title: CI Validation Workflow
artifacts.scope: Unit tests plus deterministic run-bundle integration on every push
artifacts.command: python -m unittest discover; scenariolens run; scenariolens run-verify; scenariolens release-check
artifacts.data_status: CI-safe fixtures only
artifacts.why_it_matters: Shows the framework is maintained as software, not just a set of static reports.
artifacts.limitation: Live Waymo shards remain local and are not required in CI.

artifacts.title: Public Surface Check
artifacts.scope: Offline check for public links, payload contracts, raw-data boundary, and CI smoke coverage
artifacts.data_status: CI-safe repository metadata and derived public artifacts only
artifacts.why_it_matters: Turns the public repo surface into a testable release gate instead of relying on manual README/demo inspection.
artifacts.limitation: External links are counted but not fetched to keep CI deterministic.
